dictionary_sections.definition: EID_1081 Equation Source is a source-backed Opera Omnia registry packet centered on the canonical relation \\mathcal{M}_{\\rm helix} = S^1 \times \\mathbb{R} \\hookrightarrow \\mathbb{R}^3, \. It identifies the mathematical spine of the cited chapter and gives the entry a concrete equation, symbol key, and derivation chain for the four-page production layout.

\item Source context: the chapter prose that explains why the formula belongs in the registry.
\item TRAWIN closure: the reading of the formula through time, rotation, action, wave, integration, and normalization.
